name: cyclonedx-assessors-studio
description: CycloneDX Assessors Studio - Assessment and Attestation Management

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix tests/e2e install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run typecheck:e2e
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e:install: npm --prefix tests/e2e install && npm --prefix tests/e2e run install:browsers
scripts.e2e:clean: rm -rf backend/data/pglite-e2e tests/e2e/data tests/e2e/auth/storage-states/*.json tests/e2e/test-results tests/e2e/playwright-report
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/dist backend/data frontend/dist tests/e2e/test-results tests/e2e/playwright-report tests/e2e/auth/storage-states/*.json
